'''wolashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnocarpous|gymnocarpous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnocarpous|gymnocarpous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wolashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wolashithi|wolashithi]] || [[word:wolashiji|wolashiji]] || [[word:wolashishi|wolashishi]] || [[word:wolashiki|wolashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wolashuthuthu|wolashuthuthu]] || [[word:wolashujuju|wolashujuju]] || [[word:wolashushushu|wolashushushu]] || [[word:wolashukuku|wolashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wolashuthu|wolashuthu]] || [[word:wolashuju|wolashuju]] || [[word:wolashushu|wolashushu]] || [[word:wolashuku|wolashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wolashufthuf|wolashufthuf]] || [[word:wolashufjuf|wolashufjuf]] || [[word:wolashufshuf|wolashufshuf]] || [[word:wolashufkuf|wolashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wolashethe|wolashethe]] || [[word:wolasheje|wolasheje]] || [[word:wolasheshe|wolasheshe]] || [[word:wolasheke|wolasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wolashothotho|wolashothotho]] || [[word:wolashojojo|wolashojojo]] || [[word:wolashoshosho|wolashoshosho]] || [[word:wolashokoko|wolashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wolashotho|wolashotho]] || [[word:wolashojo|wolashojo]] || [[word:wolashosho|wolashosho]] || [[word:wolashoko|wolashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wolashofthof|wolashofthof]] || [[word:wolashofjof|wolashofjof]] || [[word:wolashofshof|wolashofshof]] || [[word:wolashofkof|wolashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wolashïfthïf|wolashïfthïf]] || [[word:wolashïfjïf|wolashïfjïf]] || [[word:wolashïfshïf|wolashïfshïf]] || [[word:wolashïfkïf|wolashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wolashïfthïfthïf|wolashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:wolashïfjïfjïf|wolashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:wolashïfshïfshïf|wolashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:wolashïfkïfkïf|wolashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wolashïfthïf|wolashïfthïf]] || [[word:wolashïfjïf|wolashïfjïf]] || [[word:wolashïfshïf|wolashïfshïf]] || [[word:wolashïfkïf|wolashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wolashïfthïf|wolashïfthïf]] || [[word:wolashïfjïf|wolashïfjïf]] || [[word:wolashïfshïf|wolashïfshïf]] || [[word:wolashïfkïf|wolashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wolashæthæ|wolashæthæ]] || [[word:wolashæjæ|wolashæjæ]] || [[word:wolashæshæ|wolashæshæ]] || [[word:wolashækæ|wolashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wolashathatha|wolashathatha]] || [[word:wolashajaja|wolashajaja]] || [[word:wolashashasha|wolashashasha]] || [[word:wolashakaka|wolashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wolashatha|wolashatha]] || [[word:wolashaja|wolashaja]] || [[word:wolashasha|wolashasha]] || [[word:wolashaka|wolashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wolashafthaf|wolashafthaf]] || [[word:wolashafjaf|wolashafjaf]] || [[word:wolashafshaf|wolashafshaf]] || [[word:wolashafkaf|wolashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wolashasha|wolashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wolashësha|wolashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wolashrosha|wolashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wolashmusha|wolashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wolashyasha|wolashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowolashnkshësha|gowolashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowolashnkrosha|gowolashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowolashnkmusha|gowolashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowolashnkyasha|gowolashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wolalashasha|wolalashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wolalashësha|wolalashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wolalashrosha|wolalashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wolalashmusha|wolalashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wolalashyasha|wolalashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowolalashnkshësha|gowolalashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowolalashnkrosha|gowolalashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowolalashnkmusha|gowolalashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowolalashnkyasha|gowolalashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:welæshasha|welæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:welæshësha|welæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:welæshrosha|welæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:welæshmusha|welæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:welæshyasha|welæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowelæshnkshësha|gowelæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowelæshnkrosha|gowelæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowelæshnkmusha|gowelæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowelæshnkyasha|gowelæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wolfashasha|wolfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wolfashësha|wolfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wolfashrosha|wolfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wolfashmusha|wolfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wolfashyasha|wolfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowolfashnkshësha|gowolfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowolfashnkrosha|gowolfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowolfashnkmusha|gowolfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowolfashnkyasha|gowolfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
